summary.symptom: Hooks and subagent surfaces can drift; built-in-first usage is not hard-enforced.
summary.suspected_cause: Missing enforceable gate for hook registration, codex subagent wiring, and built-in-first routing.
summary.impact: Config/process slop and duplicate tooling creation risk.
summary.next_action: Run scripts/check-tooling-governance.sh weekly via weekly-slop loop and CI; ratchet budget downward intentionally.

evidence.debug_summary: PASS: check-tooling-governance + workflow-contract + mirror checks after wiring.

notes.author: codex
notes.text: reported: Hooks and subagent surfaces can drift; built-in-first usage is not hard-enforced.

notes.author: codex
notes.text: Implemented deterministic tooling governance lint (hooks/subagents/built-ins), budget ratchet, and wired checks into workflow wrappers + CI.

incidents.title: jarvis-acceptance-gate mktemp template incompatible on macOS

summary.symptom: scripts/workflow/verify.sh failed on acceptance-gate with mktemp File exists during build log capture
summary.suspected_cause: mktemp template included suffix after XXXXXX causing collision/compatibility issues on macOS
summary.impact: deterministic verify wrapper could fail before reporting real gate results
summary.next_action: keep mktemp template suffix-free and monitor wrapper runs for recurrence

notes.author: operator

notes.author: operator

incidents.title: format:check fails due existing src formatting drift

summary.impact: CI format gate cannot pass until files are normalized
summary.next_action: run prettier --write on affected src files in a dedicated formatting PR and re-run ci

notes.author: user
notes.text: reported: npm run format:check reports style issues across multiple src/*.ts files

incidents.title: Workers not connected; Andy developer cannot restart workers; push task blocked

summary.symptom: Workers are not connected and I don't have access to restart them. To restart the push task: start worker containers manually via deployment system, then I will dispatch push task. Alternative: push branches manually from local environment.
summary.impact: Valid worker output can be produced after auto-fail, but DB status remains failed because failed->review_requested transition is blocked; Andy reports workers disconnected and re-dispatch loops
summary.next_action: Implement watchdog guard for in-flight worker processing/repair handoff and optionally track no-container elapsed separately; then re-run probe + real multi-step dispatch and confirm no invalid transition logs

notes.author: operator
notes.text: 2026-03-03 patch applied: coupled watchdog timeout path with runtime fallback stops (GroupQueue abort now supports activeContainerName/groupFolder fallback and supervisor passes run lifecycle metadata). Probe watchdog/no-output budgets tightened (110s/115s) to keep verify-worker-connectivity deterministic. Evidence after restart (pid 67118): probe runs now terminalize failed_timeout with timeout_ms=110000 and abort.detail=runtime_container_stop_fallback; stale queued/running counts remain 0; no in-flight probe backlog persists after probe/verify runs.

notes.author: operator
notes.text: 2026-03-03 live post-refactor validation: verify-worker-connectivity FAILED. Probe runs probe-jarvis-worker-1-1772552703-12783 and probe-jarvis-worker-2-1772552823-26146 both terminalized failed_timeout with reason stale_probe_run_watchdog (~110s). Logs show runtime_container_stop_fallback stopVerified=true, then generation-guarded terminal update rejected and completion path attempted failed_runtime with missing completion block; final status remained failed_timeout.

notes.author: operator
notes.text: 2026-03-03 implementation validation: applied terminal-is-final race fix (no ungated completion fallback), probe watchdog moved to env-backed 180s with verify guard 240s. After daemon restart (pid 88861), verify-worker-connectivity still FAILS but reason shifted from stale_probe_run_watchdog to worker_execution_timeout (container no_output_timeout after 115000ms) for probe runs probe-jarvis-worker-1-1772561978-20667 and probe-jarvis-worker-2-1772562102-29270. No new 'falling back to ungated completion' or invalid completion transition logs for these runs.

incidents.title: Andy greeting delayed after hi due to no-output run

summary.symptom: Andy greeting delayed after hi due to no-output run
summary.impact: User pings in Andy-Developer can be consumed without timely reply; perceived responsiveness is poor and trust in lane health degrades.
summary.next_action: Add a fast-path greeting handler for simple salutations in andy-developer before heavy workflow logic, and add watchdog handling that aborts/stops no-output Andy runs earlier with immediate fallback reply.

notes.author: operator
notes.text: 2026-03-03 verification: happiness-gate still failing; script/test-andy-user-e2e.ts reports Simple Greeting latency 15963ms (limit 8000ms). Natural status text path also still emits req-tracking responses in chat history.

notes.author: operator
notes.text: 2026-03-03: post-fix happiness-gate PASS (greeting/status/progress latency <1s) with conversational frontdesk replies; keep open until manual User POV runbook + explicit user confirmation.

notes.author: operator
notes.text: 2026-03-03 watch/log check still shows no-output and stale probe watchdog patterns; andy responsiveness risk remains open pending fast-path greeting and watchdog behavior hardening.

incidents.title: jarvis-worker-1 probe failed_contract due completion branch mismatch

summary.symptom: jarvis-worker-1 probe failed_contract due completion branch mismatch
summary.suspected_cause: worker completion contract drift: first completion block used stale branch, causing branch mismatch validation
summary.impact: verify-worker-connectivity can fail even when worker runtime is healthy; creates false-negative reliability signal for mission gate
summary.next_action: tighten worker probe completion validation/retry path so stale first completion blocks do not leave failed_contract terminal state

notes.author: operator
notes.text: 2026-03-03: fixed completion parser to prefer latest valid <completion> block (src/dispatch-validator.ts). Added regression test in src/jarvis-worker-dispatch.test.ts. Focused probe run probe-jarvis-worker-1-1772523711-18103 PASS review_requested.

notes.author: operator
notes.text: 2026-03-03 post-fix validation: verify-worker-connectivity --skip-prechecks PASS with jarvis-worker-1 review_requested (probe-jarvis-worker-1-1772523843-18433) and jarvis-worker-2 review_requested (probe-jarvis-worker-2-1772523906-6470).

notes.author: operator
notes.text: 2026-03-03 status confirms one dispatch-block artifact exists (request_id validation mismatch on probe run); branch/contract validation noise still impacts connectivity signal.

incidents.title: verify-worker-connectivity preflight false-negative during transient launchd/container status window

summary.symptom: verify-worker-connectivity preflight false-negative during transient launchd/container status window
summary.suspected_cause: preflight check in verify-worker-connectivity intermittently observes launchd/container status as down while standalone preflight passes...
summary.impact: verify-worker-connectivity returns FAIL despite successful worker probe and stale-state gates, creating noisy reliability signal
summary.next_action: stabilize service/runtime health sampling in verify prechecks or split hard-gate and advisory precheck modes

notes.author: operator
notes.text: 2026-03-03 mitigation applied: verify-worker-connectivity preflight changed to advisory; functional gates (probe dispatch + lane evidence + stale-state) remain hard-fail. Command now returns PASS with WARN preflight in transient windows.

notes.author: operator
notes.text: 2026-03-03 deterministic gate update: preflight now uses launchctl print state checks, prints concrete failure detail, and verify-worker-connectivity hard-fails preflight before probe to avoid mixed signals. Added permission-block hint when container checks fail with Operation not permitted in restricted contexts.

notes.author: operator
notes.text: 2026-03-03 follow-up: preflight stale-queue check now distinguishes non-probe vs probe runs. Non-probe stale queue remains hard-fail; stale probe backlog is warning, preventing diagnostics deadlock while preserving signal.
